_note: Editorial team-discovery cards for neutral fans who want a rooting interest without picking a random badge.

profiles.pitch: Pick Brazil if you want star power, noise, and the feeling that every attack might become a highlight.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: The shirt carries instant World Cup mythology.
Big attacking moments are part of the package.
They are easy to explain to casual friends because everyone already understands the aura.

profiles.pitch: Pick Morocco if you want a tournament team that can punch a giant in the mouth and make it look deserved.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: They bring genuine belief instead of just survival energy.
Their defensive structure makes every counterattack feel dangerous.
They are one of the easiest teams to root for if you love bracket chaos.

profiles.pitch: Pick Japan if you like organization, quick combinations, and a team that rarely looks rattled.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: They are often one of the cleanest watchable teams in the tournament.
They can defend compactly and still attack with real speed.
They reward fans who notice spacing and timing.

profiles.pitch: Pick the USA if you want host-country emotion, crowd energy, and the pressure of being watched by everyone at home.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: The atmosphere will feel bigger because every match carries host-nation attention.
The stakes are easy to understand even if you are new to the sport.
Home crowds turn every momentum swing into a louder emotional ride.

profiles.pitch: Pick Uruguay if you like teams that feel sharp-edged, competitive, and a little dangerous.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: They carry genuine World Cup history without feeling like a museum piece.
Their matches usually feel combative instead of sleepy.
They are a good fit for fans who enjoy midfield control with bite.

profiles.pitch: Pick the Netherlands if you want a team that usually looks coherent, technical, and tournament-ready.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: They are one of the best teams for learning shape and spacing while still enjoying star quality.
They usually offer a balance between control and direct threat.
The orange visual identity is impossible to miss.

profiles.pitch: Pick Senegal if you want athletic power, emotional crowds, and the feeling that they can hit elite teams in transition.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: Their games often have a real physical edge to them.
They can defend honestly and still threaten with serious pace.
They are a strong choice for fans who want an underdog that does not feel small.

profiles.pitch: Pick Curacao if you want the pure fairy-tale experience of a tiny football nation entering the giant stage.
whyYouWillEnjoyIt: Every result feels historic rather than routine.
Neutral fans naturally lean toward first-time or smaller-scale stories.
The emotional upside is massive compared with expectations.
